Assign-Message-1.name: Assign-Message-1
Assign-Message-1.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="Assign-Message-1">
    <DisplayName>Assign Message-1</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <Copy source="request">
        <Headers/>
        <QueryParams/>
        <FormParams/>
        <Payload/>
        <Verb/>
        <StatusCode/>
        <ReasonPhrase/>
        <Path/>
    </Copy>
    <Remove>
        <Headers>
            <Header name="h1"/>
        </Headers>
        <QueryParams>
            <QueryParam name="q1"/>
        </QueryParams>
        <FormParams>
            <FormParam name="f1"/>
        </FormParams>
        <Payload/>
    </Remove>
    <Add>
        <Headers/>
        <QueryParams/>
        <FormParams/>
    </Add>
    <Set>
        <Headers/>
        <QueryParams/>
        <FormParams/>
        <!-- <Verb>GET</Verb> -->
        <Path/>
    </Set>
    <AssignVariable>
        <Name>name</Name>
        <Value/>
        <Ref/>
    </AssignVariable>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="request"/>
</AssignMessage>

Assign-MockResponse.name: Assign-MockResponse
Assign-MockResponse.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="Assign-MockResponse">
    <DisplayName>mockResponse</DisplayName>
    <Set>
        <Payload contentType="application/json">{
                "mockData": "This is a mock response from Apigee",
                "status": "success"
            }</Payload>
        <Headers>
            <Header name="Content-Type">application/json</Header>
        </Headers>
        <StatusCode>200</StatusCode>
        <ReasonPhrase>OK</ReasonPhrase>
    </Set>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="response"/>
</AssignMessage>

GetKVM.name: GetKVM
GetKVM.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="secret-passwords" async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="GetKVM">
    <DisplayName>GetKVM</DisplayName>
    <ExpiryTimeInSecs>86400</ExpiryTimeInSecs>
    <Scope>environment</Scope>
    <Get assignTo="private.secret-password-1">
        <Key>
            <Parameter>secret-password-1</Parameter>
        </Key>
    </Get>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

Process-Encrypted-Value.name: Process-Encrypted-Value
Process-Encrypted-Value.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<Javascript async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" timeLimit="200" name="Process-Encrypted-Value">
    <DisplayName>Process-Encrypted-Value</DisplayName>
    <Properties/>
    <ResourceURL>jsc://processEncryptedValue.js</ResourceURL>
</Javascript>
